nasb.text: Then your mighty men will be dismayed, O Teman, So that everyone may be cut off from the mountain of Esau by slaughter.

esv.text: And your mighty men shall be dismayed, O Teman, so that every man from Mount Esau will be cut off by slaughter.

cnv.text: 提幔哪！你的勇士要驚惶， 因此在以掃山上人人被殺戮剪除。

ccb.text: 提幔的勇士必惊慌失措， 以扫山上的人尽遭杀戮。
